'''changocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smackhead|smackhead]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smackhead|smackhead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| changocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chængecheth|chængecheth]] || [[word:chængechej|chængechej]] || [[word:chængechesh|chængechesh]] || [[word:chængeche|chængeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:changongochoth|changongochoth]] || [[word:changongochoj|changongochoj]] || [[word:changongochosh|changongochosh]] || [[word:changongocho|changongocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:changochoth|changochoth]] || [[word:changochoj|changochoj]] || [[word:changochosh|changochosh]] || [[word:changocho|changocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:changofchoth|changofchoth]] || [[word:changofchoj|changofchoj]] || [[word:changofchosh|changofchosh]] || [[word:changofchof|changofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:changochotho|changochotho]] || [[word:changochojo|changochojo]] || [[word:changochosho|changochosho]] || [[word:changochoko|changochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:changochoth|changochoth]] || [[word:changochoj|changochoj]] || [[word:changochosh|changochosh]] || [[word:changocho|changocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:changochothol|changochothol]] || [[word:changochojol|changochojol]] || [[word:changochoshol|changochoshol]] || [[word:changochokol|changochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:changochothotho|changochothotho]] || [[word:changochojojo|changochojojo]] || [[word:changochoshosho|changochoshosho]] || [[word:changochoko|changochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:changochothon|changochothon]] || [[word:changochojon|changochojon]] || [[word:changochoshon|changochoshon]] || [[word:changochokon|changochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:changochothoro|changochothoro]] || [[word:changochojoro|changochojoro]] || [[word:changochoshoro|changochoshoro]] || [[word:changochokoro|changochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
